name: polymarket-terminal
description: Automated trading terminal for Polymarket — copy trades, market make, and snipe orderbooks from the command line

scripts.directional-v2: DIRECTIONAL_TIMEFRAMES=15m,1h DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL=preMomentumComposite DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL_MINUTES=0 DIRECTIONAL_ENTRY_PRICE=0.55 DIRECTIONAL_MAX_ENTRY_PRICE=0.60 DRY_RUN=false node src/directionalSniper.js
scripts.directional-v2-sim: DIRECTIONAL_TIMEFRAMES=15m,1h DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL=preMomentumComposite DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL_MINUTES=0 DIRECTIONAL_ENTRY_PRICE=0.55 DIRECTIONAL_MAX_ENTRY_PRICE=0.60 DRY_RUN=true node src/directionalSniper.js
scripts.directional-v3: DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL=orderFlowComposite DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL_MINUTES=3 DIRECTIONAL_ENTRY_PRICE=0.55 DIRECTIONAL_MAX_ENTRY_PRICE=0.60 DIRECTIONAL_DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT=25 DIRECTIONAL_BLOCKED_HOURS=0,3,5,8,12,14,15,19,22 DRY_RUN=false node src/directionalSniper.js
scripts.directional-v3-sim: DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL=orderFlowComposite DIRECTIONAL_SIGNAL_MINUTES=3 DIRECTIONAL_ENTRY_PRICE=0.55 DIRECTIONAL_MAX_ENTRY_PRICE=0.60 DIRECTIONAL_DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT=25 DIRECTIONAL_BLOCKED_HOURS=0,3,5,8,12,14,15,19,22 DRY_RUN=true node src/directionalSniper.js
scripts.cmm:4h: CMM_TIMEFRAMES=4h CMM_ASSETS=btc CMM_SPREAD=0.02 CMM_SHARES=10 DRY_RUN=false node src/cryptoMM.js
scripts.cmm:4h:paper: CMM_TIMEFRAMES=4h CMM_ASSETS=btc CMM_SPREAD=0.02 CMM_SHARES=20 DRY_RUN=true node src/cryptoMM.js
scripts.cmm:15m: CMM_TIMEFRAMES=15m CMM_ASSETS=btc CMM_SPREAD=0.02 CMM_SHARES=10 DRY_RUN=false node src/cryptoMM.js
scripts.cmm:15m:paper: CMM_TIMEFRAMES=15m CMM_ASSETS=btc CMM_SPREAD=0.02 CMM_SHARES=20 DRY_RUN=true node src/cryptoMM.js
scripts.cmm:combined:paper: CMM_TIMEFRAMES=4h,15m CMM_ASSETS=btc CMM_SPREAD=0.02 CMM_SHARES=20 DRY_RUN=true node src/cryptoMM.js

author: direkturcrypto
